title: Fix verific import of enum values with x and/or z

features.name: enum typedef with 1-bit x/z enumeral values
features.description: Code should include an enum typedef with logic base type where enumeral values are assigned 1-bit values containing 'x' or 'z' bits
features.snippet: typedef enum logic {d0 = 1'b0, d1 = 1'b1, dx = 1'bx, dz = 1'bz} data_t;

features.name: enum typedef with multi-bit z enumeral values
features.description: Code should include an enum typedef with multi-bit vector base type where enumeral values contain 'z' bits in various positions
features.snippet: typedef enum logic [3:0] {c0 = 4'b zzz1, c1 = 4'b zz1z, cx = 4'b z1zz, cz = 4'b 1zzz} ctrl_t;

features.name: casez statement with enum values as case items
features.description: Code should include a casez statement that uses enum values as case items, where the enum type has x/z-assigned enumeral values

features.name: case equality operator with enum operands
features.description: Code should include a case equality comparison (===) between enum-typed operands where the enum has x/z enumeral values
